results.prompt: Set a reminder every weekday at 9am ET to review my tasks and message me on Telegram.
results.response_text:
I’m delegating this to ATLAS; it is not configured yet.

TASK_PACKET v1
Owner: ATLAS
Requester: main
Objective: Set up a recurring reminder every weekday at 9 AM ET to review tasks and send a message on Telegram.
Success Criteria:
- A cron job is successfully added to trigger the reminder.
- The reminder message is sent to the user on Telegram at the specified time.
- The cron job is configured to run every weekday (Monday-Friday).
- The schedule is set for 9 AM ET (America/New_York timezone).
- The reminder text is clear and prompts task review.
Stop Gates:
- Do not proceed if the Telegram channel cannot be reliably targeted or if there are any security concerns with outbound messaging.
- Ensure the reminder is easily discoverable and modifiable by the user.
- Avoid conflicts with other critical system jobs or reminders.
results.title: Weekday reminder to Telegram
